zh.lifeSummary: 當Thibaut IV de Blois於1093年4月2日出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，他的父親Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux48歲，母親Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois30歲。他於1126年與Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1152年1月10日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內拉-素-馬內享年58歲，埋葬在法國瑟-吉馬內拉尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: Thibaut
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Thibaut IV de Blois was born on 2 April 1093, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, his father, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, was 48 and his mother, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, was 30. He married Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim in 1126. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 10 January 1152, in Lagny-sur-Marne, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 58, and was buried in Lagny, Seine-et-Marne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thibaut IV de Blois est né le 2 avril 1093, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim en 1126. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 10 janvier 1152, à Lagny-sur-Marne, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Lagny, Seine-et-Marne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thibaut IV de Blois am 2. April 1093 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux 48 und seine Mutter Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois 30. Er hat 1126 Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Januar 1152 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Lagny-sur-Marne, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Lagny, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Thibaut IV de Bloisが1093年4月2日にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meauxは48歳，母Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Bloisは30歳であった。1126年にMathilde von Kärnten-Spanheimと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1152年1月10日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンラグニー-スル-マルンで58歳で死去し，フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンラグニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thibaut IV de Blois(이)가 1093년 4월 2일 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1126년 Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1152년 1월 10일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-트-마니 라그니-수-마니에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 라그니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thibaut IV de Blois nasceu em 2 de abril de 1093, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim em 1126. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1152, em Lagny-sur-Marne, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, França, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Lagny, Seine-et-Marne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thibaut IV de Blois родился 2 апреля 1093 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim в 1126 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 10 января 1152 г. в местности лагни-сур-марн, сине-ет-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности лагни, сине-ет-марн, Франция.

Se casó con Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim en 1126. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 10 de enero de 1152, en Lagny-sur-Marne, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Lagny, Seine-et-Marne, Francia.
